payload.answer: Stored exact table facts for PPO-001 and PPO-002, including values and notes.

memory_cards.statement: PPO-001 had Reward 0.12 and Sharpe 0.45, with notes labeled baseline.
PPO-002 had Reward 0.18 and Sharpe 0.51, with notes labeled entropy tuned.
Within the table, PPO-002 outperformed PPO-001 on both Reward and Sharpe.

details: Committed exact numeric values and notes.
Added one comparison fact derived directly from the table.

repair_options: If desired, I can also store a normalized summary of best-performing run by metric.
